# HTML

{{construction}}

The ultimate guide to all things HTML, including accessibility, is [MDN Web Docs](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Learn_web_development/Core/Accessibility/HTML).

When outputing HTML files, use semantic HTML. Use CSS for styling.

CSS can easily be applied to spans and divs in Pandoc Markdown using curly braces:

- ```markdown
  <!-- div example -->
  
  ::: {style="color:blue"}
  lorem ipsum
  :::
  ```
  
  results in 
  
  ::: {style="color:blue"}
  lorem ipsum
  :::

- ```markdown
  <!-- span example -->
  
  [lorem ipsum]{style="color:green"}
  
  ```
  
  results in
  
  [lorem ipsum]{style="color:green"}
